# Tensorflow Support Coverage

Tracking exhaustive coverage of the `tensorflow` python package API.


## Detailed API

| Object Name | Type | Signature |
|---|---|---|
| `AggregationMethod` | Class | `(...)` |
| `Assert` | Function | `(condition, data, summarize, name)` |
| `CriticalSection` | Class | `(name, shared_name, critical_section_def, import_scope)` |
| `DType` | Class | `(type_enum, handle_data)` |
| `DeviceSpec` | Class | `(job, replica, task, device_type, device_index)` |
| `GradientTape` | Class | `(persistent, watch_accessed_variables)` |
| `Graph` | Class | `()` |
| `IndexedSlices` | Class | `(values, indices, dense_shape)` |
| `IndexedSlicesSpec` | Class | `(shape, dtype, indices_dtype, dense_shape_dtype, indices_shape)` |
| `Module` | Class | `(name)` |
| `NoneTensorSpec` | Class | `(...)` |
| `Operation` | Class | `(...)` |
| `OptionalSpec` | Class | `(element_spec)` |
| `RaggedTensor` | Class | `(values, row_partition, internal)` |
| `RaggedTensorSpec` | Class | `(shape, dtype, ragged_rank, row_splits_dtype, flat_values_spec)` |
| `RegisterGradient` | Class | `(op_type)` |
| `SparseTensor` | Class | `(indices, values, dense_shape)` |
| `SparseTensorSpec` | Class | `(shape, dtype)` |
| `Tensor` | Class | `(...)` |
| `TensorArray` | Class | `(dtype, size, dynamic_size, clear_after_read, tensor_array_name, handle, flow, infer_shape, element_shape, colocate_with_first_write_call, name)` |
| `TensorArraySpec` | Class | `(element_shape, dtype, dynamic_size, infer_shape)` |
| `TensorShape` | Class | `(dims)` |
| `TensorSpec` | Class | `(...)` |
| `TypeSpec` | Class | `(...)` |
| `UnconnectedGradients` | Class | `(...)` |
| `Variable` | Class | `(initial_value, trainable, validate_shape, caching_device, name, variable_def, dtype, import_scope, constraint, synchronization, aggregation, shape, experimental_enable_variable_lifting)` |
| `VariableAggregation` | Class | `(...)` |
| `VariableSynchronization` | Class | `(...)` |
| `abs` | Function | `(x, name)` |
| `acos` | Function | `(x, name)` |
| `acosh` | Function | `(x: Annotated[Any, TV_Acosh_T], name) -> Annotated[Any, TV_Acosh_T]` |
| `add` | Function | `(x, y, name)` |
| `add_n` | Function | `(inputs, name)` |
| `approx_top_k` | Function | `(input: Annotated[Any, TV_ApproxTopK_T], k: int, reduction_dimension: int, recall_target: float, is_max_k: bool, reduction_input_size_override: int, aggregate_to_topk: bool, name)` |
| `argmax` | Function | `(input, axis, output_type, name)` |
| `argmin` | Function | `(input, axis, output_type, name)` |
| `argsort` | Function | `(values, axis, direction, stable, name)` |
| `as_dtype` | Function | `(type_value)` |
| `as_string` | Function | `(input: Annotated[Any, TV_AsString_T], precision: int, scientific: bool, shortest: bool, width: int, fill: str, name) -> Annotated[Any, _atypes.String]` |
| `asin` | Function | `(x: Annotated[Any, TV_Asin_T], name) -> Annotated[Any, TV_Asin_T]` |
| `asinh` | Function | `(x: Annotated[Any, TV_Asinh_T], name) -> Annotated[Any, TV_Asinh_T]` |
| `assert_equal` | Function | `(x, y, message, summarize, name)` |
| `assert_greater` | Function | `(x, y, message, summarize, name)` |
| `assert_less` | Function | `(x, y, message, summarize, name)` |
| `assert_rank` | Function | `(x, rank, message, name)` |
| `atan` | Function | `(x: Annotated[Any, TV_Atan_T], name) -> Annotated[Any, TV_Atan_T]` |
| `atan2` | Function | `(y: Annotated[Any, TV_Atan2_T], x: Annotated[Any, TV_Atan2_T], name) -> Annotated[Any, TV_Atan2_T]` |
| `atanh` | Function | `(x: Annotated[Any, TV_Atanh_T], name) -> Annotated[Any, TV_Atanh_T]` |
